name: Peter J Clarke
bio:
born in the UK 1992. Married man with a young daughter and my dog Jewel

I have a first class MA in literature, worked as an English teacher, and currently work at a dog care center. The work is easy and the hours are relatively flexible, ideal for iRacing!

I grew up with a lot of video games including need for speed / gran turismo, and then played world of warcraft to a relatively competitive level. In 2021 I started racing again on gran turismo sport, and found it was missing the team element. I bought a proper computer in 2023 specifically to run iRacing and it’s been the way I’ve spent my own time outside of family and work life since.

In iRacing I’ve always been keen on the endurance events, because the priority is mostly about consistency, because it has the team element where you try your best to keep the car clean in the stint for your team mate, and the planning prior to the race requires communication and team work.

My favourite car is basically any GT3 car. I try them all out in preparation for a race, and find that any of them could potentially be the best fitting car and setup for any given track. The GT3 category I feel has always fit well for endurance racing. As for tracks, it has to be the Nurburgring, or Jerez, or a lot of the higher downforce European tracks. Like most I find enjoyment on tracks I can be competitive on though of course

I’m proud of the successes we’ve had in Aeris Motorsport. The wins and championships were born out of a lot of effort, preparation and focus together. iRacing provides me with an outlet to push myself and strive as a team player
